name: Veal Pot Roast (Veau Dans Le Chaudron)
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons Bacon fat or salad oil
1/2 leg of veal or 3-4 lb rolled shoulder
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt or heat the bacon fat or oil in a cast iron saucepan.
2. Stuff the garlic cloves into incisions made in the veal.
3. Place the meat in the hot fat and brown well on all sides. Do not rush this, as the color and flavor of the finished gravy depend on how well the meat has been browned.
4. Add thyme or savory and the bay leaf to the pan with the meat.
5. Arrange the potatoes and onions around the meat without adding any liquid.
6. Cover tightly and cook over medium heat until the meat is tender, about 2 hours. The vegetables will not break as there is no liquid added; the veal will make its own gravy.
7. Remove the meat to a heated platter when cooked.
8. Place the pan back on high heat and gently stir to coat the vegetables well with gravy. Boil for an additional minute or so until the gravy has a nice consistency.
